message:
style: apply rustfmt formatting to e2e tests and VDBE JIT module

Normalize code formatting across four files to satisfy `cargo fmt`:

- bd_1dp9_6_7_8_2_incremental_wal_refresh.rs: collapse multi-line
  E2E_LOCK.lock().unwrap_or_else() guards into single lines, join
  REPLAY_COMMAND const across its line break, and reflow long
  rusqlite::params![] and query_row closures to standard width
- bd_db300_6_1_1_statement_reuse_distance.rs: same lock-guard and
  REPLAY_COMMAND const reformatting for all five test functions
- bd_db300_6_1_2_first_hit_warmed_hit.rs: same lock-guard and
  REPLAY_COMMAND reformatting across six test functions, plus reflow
  of a chained .query() call
- crates/fsqlite-vdbe/src/jit.rs: reorder import braces
  (Opcode, P4, VdbeOp) to alphabetical, and collapse a triple-nested
  SqliteValue::Integer(i64::from(op.p1)) parenthesization to two
  levels matching rustfmt's preference

No behavioral changes — purely whitespace and line-wrapping adjustments.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
